name: Isometric Workflow
description: Isometric 3D illustrations showing workflows, architecture diagrams, and system connections. Great for technical process visualization.
style_prompt: Isometric 3D illustration style, clean geometric shapes, soft shadows, workflow diagram with connected nodes, modern tech aesthetic, light background, professional, no photorealism, digital illustration
color_guidance: blue primary color, white and light gray surfaces, subtle blue gradients on key elements, soft drop shadows, connection lines in blue, nodes in white with blue accents
avoid: photorealistic textures, dark backgrounds, overly complex detail, hand-drawn style
